member.name: T:NoRKN.Android.BootCompletedReceiver
member.summary: Handles system boot completion broadcasts and optionally starts the VPN service if the user has enabled the autostart setting. When the device boots this receiver loads the stored and, if is true, it starts with the configured profile.

member.name: F:NoRKN.Android.NorknVpnService.ActionStartProfile
member.summary: Action used to start the VPN service with a specific profile or mode. The BootCompletedReceiver uses this action to initiate the service when autostart is enabled. It behaves similarly to , but allows external callers to distinguish profile-based starts.

member.name: F:NoRKN.Android.NorknVpnService.ExtraProfile
member.summary: Extra key used to specify the desired VPN profile (mode) when starting the service. For backward compatibility the service also reads .

member.name: P:NoRKN.Android.TunnelSettings.AutoStartOnBoot
member.summary: Flag indicating whether the VPN service should automatically start after the device boots. When set to true, the will trigger a call to the during the boot sequence.

member.name: P:NoRKN.Android.TunnelSettings.AutoStartProfile
member.summary: The name of the profile (or mode) that should be used when automatically starting the VPN service on boot. If empty, the current will be used instead.
